conversations.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Start with an authenticated Inertia workspace.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Send a new generated password using the core mail flow.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Set a new password with a valid reset token.

verify.title: Verify email
verify.description: Email verification is powered by the core notification flow. Send a fresh verification message when the current user still needs to verify their address.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences.
settings.program_mode_help: Switch between cashback (money off future purchases) and stamps (collect N for a free reward).
settings.mode_cashback_help: Every purchase credits a percentage of the spend back to the wallet.
settings.mode_stamps_help: The cashier adds one stamp per drink paid at full price. Fill the card for a free reward.
settings.stamps_per_reward_help: How many stamps the customer needs to earn before they can redeem one free reward.
settings.stamps_per_reward_label_help: The free reward name shown to the customer and to staff.

index.title: Scan wallet
index.heading: Scan a customer QR
index.subheading: Point the camera at the customer's wallet QR. We'll jump straight to their balance.
index.camera_denied: Camera access was denied. Use the manual entry above.
index.scanner_error: We couldn't start the camera. Please check permissions or use manual entry.
index.no_camera: No camera found on this device.

show.title: Wallet — {name}
show.disabled_notice: This wallet is disabled. Re-enable it from the full wallet view to take actions.
show.actions_heading: What do you want to do?

index.title: Wallets
index.heading: Customer wallets
index.search_placeholder: Search by name, phone, wallet #, or scanned code

show.title: Wallet — {name}
show.disabled_notice: This wallet is disabled. Enable it to take actions.
show.disable_confirm: Disable this wallet? The customer will not be able to earn or redeem until you re-enable it.
show.stamp_count_help: How many drinks the cashier is adding now.
show.rewards_count_help: How many free rewards to redeem. Max: floor(stamps / {per_reward}).
show.stamp_redeem_confirm: Redeem {count} free reward(s) from this wallet?

index.title: Transactions
index.heading: All transactions
index.search_placeholder: Search by note, name, or wallet #

index.title: Settings
index.heading: Program settings
index.subheading: Tune the cashback rate, currency, and the program + store name shown to customers.
index.cashback_rate_help: Percent of the purchase amount credited as rewards. 10% is a sensible default.
index.currency_help: 3-letter ISO code shown next to balances (CZK, EUR, …).
index.program_name_help: The name shown on the customer-facing wallet.
index.store_name_help: The name shown on receipts and the staff header.

forms.purchase_amount_help: The pre-cashback amount the customer just paid.
forms.redeem_amount_help: The amount to deduct from the rewards balance and apply as a discount.
forms.adjust_amount_help: For 'set', the new balance; for 'add' or 'subtract', the change to apply.
forms.adjust_note_help: Required. Tell future staff why this change was made.

store_qr.title: Store QR — print
store_qr.headline: Open your cashback wallet in a single scan
store_qr.qr_alt: QR code to open the wallet at {url}
store_qr.scan_prompt: Scan the code with your phone camera. The wallet opens in the browser — no app, no email.
store_qr.footer: Printed from the Teacha Rewards admin.
store_qr.admin_hint: Prints on A4 / Letter. For label printing, set the printer size to 10 × 10 cm.

errors.failed_response: Failed to generate response. Please try again.

agent.cancel_run_confirm: Cancel the running agent? Your progress will be lost.
agent.clarification_hint: Pick the option that best matches your intent.
agent.error_generic: The agent run failed. Please try again.

reward.purchase_amount_positive: Purchase amount must be greater than zero.
reward.redeem_amount_positive: Redeem amount must be greater than zero.
reward.redeem_amount_exceeds_balance: You cannot redeem more than the current balance.
reward.manual_amount_positive: Adjustment amount must be greater than zero.
reward.manual_subtract_exceeds_balance: Cannot subtract more than the current balance.
reward.manual_set_negative: Balance cannot be set to a negative value.
reward.note_required: A reason is required for manual adjustments.
reward.invalid_phone: That phone number doesn't look right.

marketing.headline: Get rewarded for every matcha.
marketing.subheadline: Earn cashback on every matcha, bubble tea, and seasonal drop. Open your wallet in under thirty seconds.
marketing.step_1: Open your wallet with your phone number and first name.
marketing.step_2: Show the QR code at the till to earn cashback on every purchase.
marketing.step_3: Redeem your rewards balance as a discount whenever you like.
marketing.cta: Create or open my rewards wallet
marketing.privacy: No password, no email. Your wallet is identified only by your phone number.

create.title: Open your rewards wallet
create.heading: Create or open my rewards wallet
create.subheading: We'll look you up by phone number. If you already have a wallet, we'll open it. If not, we'll create one on the spot.
create.privacy: We never share your phone number. It is the only key to your wallet.

show.title: Wallet — {name}
show.disabled_notice: This wallet is currently disabled. Please see staff at the counter.

offline.title: Offline
offline.heading: You're offline
offline.body: We can't reach Teacha Rewards right now. Reconnect to see your wallet or open a new one.

install.banner_heading: Add Teacha to your home screen
install.banner_body: Open your wallet with one tap. Works even without signal.
install.ios_step_1: Tap the Share button in your browser.
install.ios_step_2: Choose "Add to Home Screen" from the menu.
install.guide_intro: For the fastest access to your wallet, install Teacha as an app.
install.guide_chrome_body: Click the install icon in the address bar or use the browser menu.
